# Pull Request

## Classification

- Product behavior change: <!-- yes | no -->
- Change stage: <!-- proposed | implemented | drift-investigation | not-applicable -->
- Sync verdict: <!-- ready_for_write | skip | not-applicable -->
- Authority: <!-- path or decision when behavior changes -->
- Sync result reference: <!-- link/path/chat artifact when behavior changes -->

## Behavior delta

- Before: <!-- required when Product behavior change = yes -->
- After: <!-- required when Product behavior change = yes -->
- Unchanged guardrails: <!-- required when Product behavior change = yes -->
- No behavior change reason: <!-- required when Product behavior change = no -->

## Docs impact

- Changed docs/app paths:
  - <!-- docs/app/... or leave empty and fill No docs impact reason -->
- No docs impact reason: <!-- required when no docs/app paths changed -->

## Test evidence

| Command | Result | Coverage |
| --- | --- | --- |
| <!-- npm run verify:phaseXX --> | <!-- pass | not-run | not-required --> | <!-- what the command actually covers --> |

Do not paste credentials, tokens, or secrets into this section.

## Confirmation

- [ ] Reviewed `product-change sync result` when this PR changes product behavior
- [ ] Reviewed docs impact against changed `docs/app` paths or recorded no-doc-impact reason
- [ ] Recorded test evidence with result and coverage
